subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having illumined my heart with the light of Thy knowledge and having sent down unto me such as is everlasting in Thine eternity
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک عقول و قلوب را لایق و سزاست که باسم محبوب عالم مفقود... لک الحمد یا الهی بما نورت قلبی بنور معرفتک و انزلت لی ما یکون باقیاً ببقائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @Hands of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God
